chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 3129 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For katcha Peshi 30.01.2018. Mr. Faisal Nadeem Abro Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto Asstt:A.G a/w P.I S. Manzoor Ali on behalf of SSP Hyderabad. -=-=- Learned Asstt:A.G files comments of respondents No.2 & 3, which is taken on record, copy whereof supplied to the counsel for the petitioner. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that he would be satisfied and would not press this constitutional petition, if petitioner is allowed to file direct complaint before the concerned court for redressal of his grievances, if he so desire. Learned Asstt:A.G has raised no objection to the above proposition. In view of above, this petition stands dismissed. However, petitioner would be at liberty to file direct complaint against the respondent, if he so desire. If the direct complaint is filed the trial court shall decide the same in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE A.Rasheed
